column1: # This CSV file describes the samples to be converted to BulkMulti format.
# Each row represents one sample with corresponding Pipeline output files.
# - sample_id: Sample identifier that matches Pipeline output file prefixes
# - display_name: Display name for the sample in Landscape View
# - color: Color code in hex format (e.g.
# - description: Detailed description of the sample
# File path inference (based on --pipeline-dir and sample_id):
# - ananse_network: Full path to ANANSE network.txt file
# - els_bed: Full path to ELS BED file
# - tpm_file: Full path to RNA TPM file
# - bigwig_file: Full path to BigWig file
# - sample_id: Must match Pipeline output file prefixes (case-sensitive)
# - color: Use distinct colors for different sample types
